prev_track_disabled: Previous track (only available for YouTube stations)
next_track_disabled: Next track (only available for YouTube stations)
unavailable_toast: {station} is unavailable right now. Check your connection or try another station.
settings_description: Curated stations playing in the background. Two kinds: YouTube tracklists (via a hidden IFrame Player — use the prev/next buttons to skip tracks) and direct internet streams (single continuous source — use the picker to switch). The controller lives in the centre of the app footer.
enable_description: Off by default. When on, a compact controller appears in the centre of the footer. Your choice is remembered across restarts.
picker_empty: All stations are hidden. Enable some in Settings → Account.
auto_resume_label: Reprendre la dernière station au lancement
auto_resume_description: Lorsqu'elle est activée, la dernière station diffusée démarre automatiquement la première fois que la radio se charge après l'ouverture de l'application. Désactivé par défaut.
